summary: Iter 258 frontend verification of the Iconization-sweep + modal-shrink sweep. Initial run found the deployed dist/ was stale (built before the new edits), so the new chips/icons were not rendered (Vite preview serves dist/, not HMR). After running `sudo supervisorctl restart frontend` to trigger `vite build && vite preview`, 11/12 spec points pass. The single regression is HotelsResults.jsx: it imports FilterChipSelect and ViewModeToggle but never renders them — the old <Select role=combobox> sort dropdown is still on the page (1 combobox detected).

ui_bugs.issue: FilterChipSelect + ViewModeToggle imports added but never used; old <Select> still renders for sort (button role=combobox present). No filter-* / view-mode-* testids appear on /services/hotels/results.

verified_observations.build_pipeline: supervisor runs `vite build && vite preview --port 3000`. dist/index.html mtime (22:46) was earlier than Orders.jsx (23:11), so the served bundle was stale. After supervisorctl restart, dist/ rebuilt at 23:20 and all new code took effect. No code change needed in dev — just a redeploy trigger.

orders_page.notes: Icon-only at 28px when default, expands to ~70px with text when a non-default value is chosen. Popover shows filter-option-* items.

hotels.reason: FilterChipSelect/ViewModeToggle imported but unused; old Select kept (line 862-872 of HotelsResults.jsx)

events.note: spec compliant; uses page-specific testids instead of the default filter-* fallback

modal_card_shrink_source_review.TravelManagement_RouteCard: grid grid-cols-4 gap-1.5 mb-3 with p-1.5 bg-slate-50 rounded-md tiles (was previously larger). Matches spec for compact 4-tile Departure/Arrival/Seats/Price row.
modal_card_shrink_source_review.TravelManagement_VehicleCard: grid grid-cols-2 gap-1.5 mb-2.5 with p-1.5 bg-slate-50 tiles. Matches spec for tighter Manufacturer/Model grid.
modal_card_shrink_source_review.CarRentalManagement_CarCard: grid grid-cols-4 gap-1.5 mb-2.5 with p-1.5 bg-slate-50 (Seats/Fuel/Trans./Day-price). Matches spec.
modal_card_shrink_source_review.LaundryBooking_ItemCard: Card p-2; outer grid 'grid-cols-2 sm:grid-cols-3 md:grid-cols-4 gap-2 max-h-[420px] overflow-y-auto'. Quantity badge w-5/h-5 text-[10px]. Matches spec for denser grid + smaller thumbnails/+/- buttons; default 2 cols on mobile, 4 cols on md/lg.

action_items: Migrate HotelsResults.jsx sort dropdown to FilterChipSelect (the imports already exist at lines 7-8 but the JSX at line 862-872 still uses <Select>/<SelectValue>). Also add the shared ViewModeToggle in place of the existing view toggle on that page so it matches the other 8 service results pages. This is the only spec point that fails at runtime.

(Process) Consider adding a post-edit hook or document for main-agent E1: after large JSX edits, trigger `sudo supervisorctl restart frontend` once so the dist/ bundle reflects the source. Vite preview does NOT auto-rebuild; current iter wasted one test pass on a stale bundle.
critical_code_review_comments: HotelsResults.jsx L7-9: import FilterChipSelect and ViewModeToggle are present but unreferenced; ESLint should flag this as no-unused-vars. The actual Sort UI at L862-872 still uses the legacy Radix Select. Functional regression vs spec.
FilterChipSelect chip width is 28-29px in the icon-only state and ~70px when active — visually consistent across Orders, Bills, Receipts, Employees, Cinema, etc.

EventsResults.jsx uses explicit data-testids 'events-type-filter' and 'events-sort-by' instead of the default 'filter-type'/'filter-sort'. Functional but inconsistent naming vs other results pages (which use 'filter-*'). Optional cleanup.
TravelManagement Routes/Vehicles cards, CarRentalManagement car cards, and LaundryBooking ItemCard all use p-1.5/p-2 with gap-1.5 — visually compact and matches spec.
validation-refresh and bills-export-all both render as 28px icon buttons with tooltips and trigger the correct action (reload / CSV download).

success_rate.frontend: 11/12 spec points pass — only HotelsResults sort/view-toggle migration is incomplete

context_for_next_testing_agent: Vite preview environment: edits to .jsx files are NOT live until `sudo supervisorctl restart frontend` triggers a fresh `vite build`. Watch dist/index.html mtime vs source mtime to spot staleness. FilterChipSelect chips on Orders/Bills/Receipts/Validation/Ratings all working at runtime — testids 'filter-category', 'filter-status', 'filter-sort', 'bills-export-all', 'validation-refresh', 'export-ratings-btn'. Service results testids: filter-cuisine (restaurants), filter-vehicle-type/transmission (car-rental), filter-status/rating/duration (cinema), events-type-filter/events-sort-by (events — custom names!). HotelsResults.jsx still ships old Select for sort — verify after main agent fixes.
rca of the issue: HotelsResults.jsx received the FilterChipSelect/ViewModeToggle imports during the iconization sweep, but the actual JSX migration was missed — the old Radix <Select>/<SelectValue> block at lines ~862-872 was not replaced. The other 8 service-results pages were converted correctly. Fix is mechanical: swap the <Select> block for <FilterChipSelect icon={...} label='Sort' value={sortBy} onChange={setSortBy} options={SORT_OPTIONS} /> and inline a <ViewModeToggle value={viewMode} onChange={setViewMode} /> next to it, matching TravelResults.jsx layout.
